scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix iestmaps_api install && npm --prefix iestmaps_react install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB,TUNNEL -c green,cyan,yellow "set PORT=3001&& set FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5174&& npm --prefix iestmaps_api run dev" "npm --prefix iestmaps_react run dev -- --port 5174 --strictPort" "cloudflared --url http://localhost:5174 --no-autoupdate"
scripts.dev:no-tunnel: concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "set PORT=3001&& set FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5174&& npm --prefix iestmaps_api run dev" "npm --prefix iestmaps_react run dev -- --port 5174 --strictPort"
